## Description

Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows style guidelines (Black, Ruff)
- [ ] Type checking passes (MyPy)
- [ ] Tests pass (pytest)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
